overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves from under a dark overpass through covered walkways and across wet streets, passing digital billboards and other pedestrians in a dense urban environment with reflective wet pavement and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: under highway overpass approaching urban intersection

events.description: emerges from under dark concrete overpass into open intersection with large digital billboard visible ahead
camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers and neon signs above the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward from under the overpass toward the open intersection, passing a lit vending machine on the left

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving across the wet intersection in the distance

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars creating a dark canopy overhead
large illuminated billboard displaying cyberpunk-style advertisement with orange and white text
brightly lit vending machine with blue and red lighting positioned under the overpass
rain-slicked asphalt surface reflecting the sparse overhead lights
tall modern glass building with illuminated windows rising above the street level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, sheltered space beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. The character walks forward on wet asphalt toward an open intersection where a large digital billboard glows in the distance. A lit vending machine stands to the left under the overpass shadows, while a white sports car crosses the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with glass storefronts and neon lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway with overhead concrete protection and illuminated glass building facades on the right
character maintains steady walking pace while approaching advertisement pillars in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to a modern glass building, following a pedestrian with red hair ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and green backpack walking ahead on the sidewalk, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with linear LED lighting strips providing partial cover
modern glass skyscraper with reflective windows and warm interior lighting visible through the glass
futuristic street lamps with warm yellow and cool white linear lighting elements
tall palm trees lining the edge of the walkway between the sidewalk and the street
yellow textured guidance strip running along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open intersection into a covered pedestrian walkway with a high concrete ceiling lined with linear lights. To the right, a modern glass building facade reflects the neon street lights, while palm trees line the edge of the walkway. The character follows another pedestrian with a green backpack along the yellow tactile paving strip.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit stop with digital advertisement pillars and seating areas

events.description: passing group of three seated NPCs resting on concrete benches near tall advertisement pillars
pedestrian with red cap walks past the camera from right to left, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past advertisement pillars where several NPCs are seated on benches, overtaking a pedestrian with a red cap

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs sitting on concrete benches near the advertisement pillars, one appears to be using a device

entered.detail: tall rectangular digital advertisement pillar displaying 'WIDE OPEN' text with vibrant purple and pink graphics
digital pillar showing medical advertisement with a face and text about reproductive services
low concrete platforms arranged as seating areas at the base of the advertisement pillars
glass and metal transit shelter with illuminated interior and seating

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues past a transit stop area featuring tall digital advertisement pillars with bright neon displays, including one with 'WIDE OPEN' text. Several NPCs sit on concrete benches at the base of the pillars. The character overtakes another pedestrian wearing a red cap while maintaining a steady pace along the covered path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk beneath elevated highway ramps

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as red sports car passes, then crossing the wet street with a group of pedestrians
camera tilts upward to view the massive elevated highway structure and tall skyscrapers above the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street at a marked crosswalk with other pedestrians, then continuing down a darker street beneath elevated highways

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past the crosswalk from right to left at moderate speed

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the wet asphalt surface
massive concrete highway overpass with support columns and linear lighting underneath
very tall dark skyscraper with scattered illuminated windows rising high above the street
tall futuristic street light with bright white vertical illumination
dark brick building facade with minimal lighting and small windows

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway and crosses a wet intersection at a marked crosswalk, waiting briefly for a red sports car to pass. The camera tilts up to reveal massive elevated highway ramps overhead with linear lighting. The character crosses with a group of other pedestrians and continues into a darker street flanked by tall buildings with minimal lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of a concrete overpass into a brightly lit pedestrian corridor before ending in a dark urban canyon. It begins beneath a massive highway structure on wet asphalt, moving toward a glowing digital billboard as a white sports car crosses the intersection ahead. As the character enters a covered walkway, the environment shifts to a high-ceilinged path lined with linear lights, reflecting neon hues off a glass building facade and palm trees. The scene then expands past a transit stop featuring towering neon advertisement pillars and waiting pedestrians before the camera follows the character out into the open air. Finally, the camera tilts up to reveal elevated highway ramps as the character crosses a wet intersection and disappears into a dimly lit street flanked by towering skyscrapers.
